title: Onboarding - Navigating through onboarding screens
scenario: User can navigate through onboarding screens by swiping left/right or tapping "Continue" to progress through the three screens in order.
steps: 1. Launch the app for the first time (onboarding not yet completed).
2. Observe the first onboarding screen titled 'Organized'.
4. Verify the second onboarding screen titled 'Up-to-Date' is displayed.
6. Verify the third onboarding screen titled 'Personal' is displayed.
8. Verify the second onboarding screen titled 'Up-to-Date' is displayed again.
expected: User can navigate forward through the three onboarding screens ("Organized" → "Up-to-Date" → "Personal") by swiping left or tapping "Continue", and navigate backward by swiping right.
